items.description: Array of breadcrumb items to display.

maxItems.description: Maximum visible items before collapsing middle items into ellipsis. When omitted, the breadcrumb auto-collapses based on container width unless autoCollapse is explicitly false.

autoCollapse.description: Auto-collapse middle items when the breadcrumb overflows its container. Ignored when maxItems is provided.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the nav container.

onItemClick.description: Called when any breadcrumb item is clicked.
